'''ngayudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:myasthenic|myasthenic]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-y-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:myasthenic|myasthenic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngayudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæyidhith|ngæyidhith]] || [[word:ngæyidhij|ngæyidhij]] || [[word:ngæyidhish|ngæyidhish]] || [[word:ngæyidhi|ngæyidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngayuyudhuth|ngayuyudhuth]] || [[word:ngayuyudhuj|ngayuyudhuj]] || [[word:ngayuyudhush|ngayuyudhush]] || [[word:ngayuyudhu|ngayuyudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngayudhuth|ngayudhuth]] || [[word:ngayudhuj|ngayudhuj]] || [[word:ngayudhush|ngayudhush]] || [[word:ngayudhu|ngayudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngayufdhuth|ngayufdhuth]] || [[word:ngayufdhuj|ngayufdhuj]] || [[word:ngayufdhush|ngayufdhush]] || [[word:ngayufdhuf|ngayufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngayudhuthu|ngayudhuthu]] || [[word:ngayudhuju|ngayudhuju]] || [[word:ngayudhushu|ngayudhushu]] || [[word:ngayudhuku|ngayudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngayudhuth|ngayudhuth]] || [[word:ngayudhuj|ngayudhuj]] || [[word:ngayudhush|ngayudhush]] || [[word:ngayudhu|ngayudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngayudhuthul|ngayudhuthul]] || [[word:ngayudhujul|ngayudhujul]] || [[word:ngayudhushul|ngayudhushul]] || [[word:ngayudhukul|ngayudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngayudhuthuthu|ngayudhuthuthu]] || [[word:ngayudhujuju|ngayudhujuju]] || [[word:ngayudhushushu|ngayudhushushu]] || [[word:ngayudhuku|ngayudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngayudhuthun|ngayudhuthun]] || [[word:ngayudhujun|ngayudhujun]] || [[word:ngayudhushun|ngayudhushun]] || [[word:ngayudhukun|ngayudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngayudhuthuoro|ngayudhuthuoro]] || [[word:ngayudhujuoro|ngayudhujuoro]] || [[word:ngayudhushuoro|ngayudhushuoro]] || [[word:ngayudhukuoro|ngayudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
